rewriteRule: Options ve placeholder kullanimlari canonical prop sirasina alinip readonly varyantlarda accessReason doldurulur; controlled state korunur.

rewritePreview.before: <Select access="readonly" value="access" onChange={() => {}} options={moduleOptions} placeholder="Yetki seviyesi" />
rewritePreview.after: <Select value="access" onChange={() => {}} options={moduleOptions} placeholder="Yetki seviyesi" access="readonly" accessReason="Sadece goruntuleme yetkisi" />

stopConditions: options prop'u inline map/fonksiyon ise rewrite atlanir
value/onChange cifti eksikse controlled-flow rewrite yapilmaz

rollbackPlan: event payload parity bozulursa diff geri alinir
readonly akista accessReason kural disi metin uretiyorsa prototype reject edilir
notes: Controlled state ve options kaynagi degismedigi surece rewrite only-prop-normalization seviyesinde kalir.
